title: Muddy Ways
description: A Pack to make your path blocks extra muddy!
body:
**Add a touch of realism and depth to your paths with the Muddy Ways resource pack!**

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f3cd37b19512dfc08199abc02fa3f193c6cff0e_0.webp)

This pack enhances the standard path block by adding muddy textures, perfect for creating swampy or rain-soaked environments. 

Whether you're building in a gloomy forest, a rainy village, or a murky swamp,
these subtle yet immersive textures will give your world a more rugged and weathered look. 

Ideal for anyone looking to add a bit of grime and character to their outdoor builds!

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
